## DreaMontage: Arbitrary Frame-Guided One-Shot Video Generation

This skill implements techniques from the paper: DreaMontage: Arbitrary Frame-Guided One-Shot Video Generation

### Core Concept

This paper presents a novel approach to solving important problems in machine learning and AI. The key innovation involves advanced methods that improve existing techniques.
